falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the pattern's expectation of a bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: CBOE VIX drops below 15 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extremely low volatility would indicate market complacency, refuting the blowoff score's implication of imminent stress.

falsification_conditions.condition: NYSE volume falls below 2 billion shares for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volume would suggest lack of participation, contradicting the pattern's implied urgency of a turning point.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
